---
title: "The Author of “Beltraffio”’"
---

## The Author of “Beltraffio”’

**Author:** Henry James
**Date:** 1884
**Imprint:** <i>English Illustrated Magazine</i> 1 (June-July 1884), 563-73, 628-39.

### Notes

Reprinted in the collections <i>The Author of \'Beltraffio\'</i> (Boston: Osgood 1885) and <i>Stories Revived</i> (London: Macmillan 1885).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
